name: Quick & Hearty Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 cups fat-free chicken broth, low sodium
20 oz potatoes, raw and peeled (cut into 1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water, broth, lentils, potatoes, tomato sauce, garlic, vinegar, and basil to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to medium-high. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add broccoli, soup vegetables, and black-eyed peas. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in rice. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
6. Top each serving with a tablespoon of yogurt.
